title: Clean Water Initiative - Southeast Asia
targetOutcome: Provide sustainable clean water sources to 100 villages.
summary: Expanding clean water access through community-led infrastructure.
fullDescription: This campaign focuses on building solar-powered wells and water filtration systems in underserved rural communities across Vietnam and Cambodia.

grantOverview.title: Funding Focus
grantOverview.desc: Infrastructure and community training for sustainable water management.

evalCriteria.title: Impact
evalCriteria.desc: Number of direct beneficiaries per dollar spent.

selCriteria.title: Compliance
selCriteria.desc: Valid non-profit registration and audited financials.

title: Digital Literacy for Rural Youth
targetOutcome: Equip 50 rural schools with computer labs and trained instructors.
summary: Bridging the digital divide for the next generation.
fullDescription: A comprehensive program to provide hardware, software, and curriculum training to teachers in remote mountainous regions.

evalCriteria.title: Innovation
evalCriteria.desc: Creative use of technology in remote areas.

selCriteria.title: Registration
selCriteria.desc: Must be a registered educational charity.

title: Empowering Women in Tech - Nigeria
targetOutcome: Train 5000 women in software development and provide job placement support.
summary: Bridging the gender gap in the Nigerian technology ecosystem.
fullDescription: An intensive bootcamp followed by a 6-month mentorship program aimed at placing women in high-growth tech roles.

grantOverview.title: Bootcamp Support
grantOverview.desc: Funding covers instructor fees and venue costs.

evalCriteria.title: Placement Rate
evalCriteria.desc: Percentage of graduates securing roles within 3 months.

selCriteria.title: Capacity
selCriteria.desc: Ability to host 50+ students per batch.

title: Amazon Reforestation Project
targetOutcome: Plant 1 million native trees and protect 5000 hectares of rainforest.
summary: Restoring the lungs of the earth through local community partnerships.
fullDescription: This project focuses on reforestation in degraded areas of the Amazon basin, using native species and providing income for local indigenous communities.

grantOverview.title: Planting Subsidy
grantOverview.desc: Funding for nursery establishment and seedling distribution.

evalCriteria.title: Survival Rate
evalCriteria.desc: Minimum 80% survival rate of planted trees after 1 year.

selCriteria.title: Land Tenure
selCriteria.desc: Proven legal right to use the land for reforestation.

title: Mobile Clinics for Remote Areas
targetOutcome: Deploy 20 mobile clinics to provide basic healthcare in remote regions of East Africa.
summary: Bringing medical care to the doorstep of those who need it most.
fullDescription: Equipping vans with medical supplies and staffing them with doctors and nurses to provide maternal care, vaccinations, and basic treatment.

grantOverview.title: Vehicle Fleet
grantOverview.desc: Funding for purchase and customization of mobile units.

evalCriteria.title: Patient Reach
evalCriteria.desc: Average number of patients treated per week per unit.

selCriteria.title: Medical License
selCriteria.desc: Valid license to provide medical services in target country.

title: Solar Power for Schools
targetOutcome: Install solar panel systems in 100 rural schools to provide consistent electricity.
summary: Powering education with clean, sustainable energy.
fullDescription: Providing schools with solar panels, batteries, and lighting to allow for evening classes and computer use.

grantOverview.title: Equipment Grant
grantOverview.desc: Funding covers solar panels, inverters, and battery storage.

selCriteria.title: Technical Team
selCriteria.desc: Must have certified solar technicians on staff.

title: Refugee Resettlement Support
targetOutcome: Provide housing and language training for 12,000 refugees arriving in Europe.
summary: Helping families rebuild their lives in a new home.
fullDescription: Offering a range of services including legal aid, temporary housing, and intensive language and vocational courses.

grantOverview.title: Service Bundle
grantOverview.desc: Funding covers housing stipends and instructor salaries.

evalCriteria.title: Language Proficiency
evalCriteria.desc: Number of participants passing A2 level language tests.

selCriteria.title: Legal Status
selCriteria.desc: Must be an authorized resettlement agency.

title: STEM Excellence for Girls
targetOutcome: Provide 8,000 girls with advanced STEM workshops and scholarships.
summary: Fostering the next generation of female scientists and engineers.
fullDescription: Hands-on workshops in coding, robotics, and biology for middle and high school girls in developing countries.

grantOverview.title: Scholarship Fund
grantOverview.desc: Grants to cover tuition and lab supplies for top performers.

evalCriteria.title: Grade Improvement
evalCriteria.desc: Average increase in STEM subjects' grades among participants.

selCriteria.title: Curriculum
selCriteria.desc: Must provide a sample syllabus for STEM workshops.

title: Ocean Plastic Recovery
targetOutcome: Remove 5,000 tons of plastic from major river mouths and coastal areas.
summary: Protecting marine life by stopping plastic at the source.
fullDescription: Deploying innovative interceptors and organizing community cleanup drives to prevent plastic from entering the oceans.

grantOverview.title: Technology Grant
grantOverview.desc: Funding for river interceptors and waste management infrastructure.

evalCriteria.title: Tonnage Removed
evalCriteria.desc: Total weight of plastic waste recovered and recycled.

selCriteria.title: Operations
selCriteria.desc: Must have existing coastal operations in high-risk zones.

title: Mental Health Support for All
targetOutcome: Provide 30,000 counseling sessions and awareness workshops globally.
summary: Reducing stigma and providing access to mental health resources.
fullDescription: A multi-faceted approach including a 24/7 helpline, online therapy sessions, and community-led awareness campaigns.

grantOverview.title: Counseling Support
grantOverview.desc: Funding for licensed therapists and helpline operators.

evalCriteria.title: Well-being Index
evalCriteria.desc: Average improvement in participant self-reported well-being scores.

selCriteria.title: Credentials
selCriteria.desc: All counselors must hold valid professional certifications.

title: Sustainable Farming Future
targetOutcome: Transition 15,000 smallholder farmers to regenerative agriculture practices.
summary: Boosting yields while protecting the soil.
fullDescription: Providing farmers with organic seeds, bio-fertilizers, and training in soil conservation and water-efficient irrigation.

grantOverview.title: Input Subsidy
grantOverview.desc: Funding for organic inputs and solar irrigation kits.

evalCriteria.title: Soil Health
evalCriteria.desc: Measured increase in soil organic matter over one year.

selCriteria.title: Farmer Base
selCriteria.desc: Must have an existing network of at least 500 farmers.

title: Youth Startup Fund
targetOutcome: Provide seed funding and mentorship to 2,000 young entrepreneurs in emerging markets.
summary: Empowering young leaders to build the businesses of tomorrow.
fullDescription: A pitch competition followed by a structured incubation program and seed grants for the most promising social enterprises.

grantOverview.title: Seed Capital
grantOverview.desc: Direct equity-free grants for prototype development.

evalCriteria.title: Business Viability
evalCriteria.desc: Strength of the business model and financial projections.

selCriteria.title: Age Limit
selCriteria.desc: Founders must be between 18 and 30 years old.

title: Powering Rural Health
targetOutcome: Provide reliable solar power and refrigeration to 150 rural health clinics.
summary: Ensuring cold chains for vaccines and light for emergency surgeries.
fullDescription: Electrifying clinics that currently lack consistent power, focusing on vaccine storage and maternity ward lighting.

grantOverview.title: Solar Hardware
grantOverview.desc: Funding for solar kits and energy-efficient refrigerators.

evalCriteria.title: Uptime
evalCriteria.desc: System availability measured over a 6-month period.

selCriteria.title: Facility Need
selCriteria.desc: Clinic must be at least 20km from the nearest power grid.

title: Empowering Adults Through Literacy
targetOutcome: Provide 15,000 illiterate adults with basic reading, writing, and numeracy skills.
summary: Opening doors to new opportunities through the power of literacy.
fullDescription: Community-based literacy classes tailored for adults, combined with basic financial literacy training.

grantOverview.title: Material Support
grantOverview.desc: Funding for textbooks, workbooks, and classroom supplies.

evalCriteria.title: Literacy Level
evalCriteria.desc: Number of participants achieving basic proficiency in reading and writing.

selCriteria.title: Location
selCriteria.desc: Must operate in areas with literacy rates below the national average.

title: Disaster Resilient Communities
targetOutcome: Build 500 disaster-resilient homes and train communities in disaster preparedness.
summary: Building stronger homes for a safer future.
fullDescription: Constructing homes using earthquake and flood-resistant techniques in high-risk areas, while training local builders.

grantOverview.title: Construction Fund
grantOverview.desc: Funding for materials and skilled labor for resilient housing.

evalCriteria.title: Resilience Rating
evalCriteria.desc: Independent assessment of the home's ability to withstand target disasters.

selCriteria.title: Expertise
selCriteria.desc: Must have architects and engineers with disaster-resilient design experience.
